{{Infobox character
| name = Presence
| appears_in = Cradle
| abilities = scour the future, detect barriers, provide explanatory text in her vision, indicate coordinates, report data, warn of suspicious things, report population counts, simple predictions, detect the number of transports or individuals, summon images and project reports
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Presence Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|In this context, a Presence is a specialized mental [[construct]] or tool used by certain individuals, such as [[Judges]], to assist with information processing and situational awareness. Functioning as an internal companion that resides within the mind, it communicates through a combination of spoken words, thoughts, and sensory impressions. These constructs are capable of performing complex tasks including scanning the future, retrieving vast amounts of data, analyzing past events, and providing mathematical probabilities for uncertain scenarios. They also serve as early warning systems by detecting spatial violations or incoming threats. While a Presence can manifest visually—often appearing as a spectral figure, such as a gray ghost or an eye—on the user's shoulder to facilitate social interaction and alleviate isolation, its primary role is functional. It acts as an advanced repository of knowledge that can remember more than a biological mind, though it is intended to be a tool for decision-making rather than a replacement for personal understanding. The personality and expressiveness of a Presence can be adjusted by its user, though they are often characterized as professional or impersonal.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Presence]] is a ghostly entity on [[Suriel]]'s shoulder that assists her with her powers.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Presence]] is a component of [[Suriel]] that reports information and acknowledges her commands.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel's Presence]] can provide explanatory text in her vision.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Suriel]] has a [[Presence]] that provides information inside her mind.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel's Presence]] manifests as a gray figure of smoke resting upon her shoulder to communicate with her. This entity is capable of reporting data, such as population counts and specific coordinates, while also providing warnings regarding suspicious activities. Beyond simple data reporting, the Presence can make basic predictions. [[Suriel]] also utilized this ability to request information regarding Wei Shi [[Lindon]] from [[Cradle]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel's Presence]] is a gray figure of smoke on her shoulder that communicates with her.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]] possesses a [[Presence]] that can indicate coordinates and report data.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel's Presence]] can warn her of suspicious things.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel's Presence]] can report population counts.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Presence]] is capable of simple predictions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]] used her [[Presence]] to request information on Wei Shi [[Lindon]] from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] possesses a [[Presence]] that can be seized by red power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]]'s [[Presence]] is a squirming mass of silver.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suriel's Presence]] can detect barriers.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Suriel's Presence]] warned of a detected deviation.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel's Presence]] is a [[construct]] of gray smoke.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel's Presence]] can materialize a simple white uniform for her.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel's Presence]] can summon images and project reports.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Presence]] is a sense used to detect the number of transports or individuals.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Suriel's Presence]] is a manifestation that can speak and act independently.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suriel]] possesses a [[Presence]] that can scour the future.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A Presence is a type of power or entity utilized during [[Abidan]] testing that functions as a tool capable of remembering more information than a person. These entities can communicate and signal their intent, with [[Cirian]]'s specific Presence manifesting as a cube of blue light. While some Presences can take the form of a creature, such as those belonging to a [[Reaper]], they also serve as guiding forces for trainers. In one instance, the Presence was used to deliver a warning from [[Sector Eleven Control]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Presence]] is a type of entity or power used in [[Abidan]] testing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cirian]]'s [[Presence]] is a cube of blue light.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Presences can communicate and signal intent.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Reaper]]'s [[Presence]] can manifest as a creature.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Presence]] is a guiding force used by trainers.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Presence]] is a tool that can remember more than a person.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Presence]] delivered the warning from [[Sector Eleven Control]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
